name: Wolf Hero: Animals vs Robots
short_description: Build a strong pack and protect the forest from evil robots!
detailed_description:
Wolf Hero: a role-playing game with simulator elements, where you have to team up with the residents of the forest to save the forest from robots. You can have children, invite animals into your pack, use spells, improve your character's talents, search for valuables and dig up treasure, fight robot squads and their bosses, complete quests and get achievements, as well as wear cool skins and more!

- FAMILY, PACK. From the start of the game, you immediately get a partner. And at level 10, you'll be able to have your first child. Each member of your pack is a full-fledged participant in the battle, who can not only attack, but also to distract the enemies.

- SKINS. There are different breeds of wolf in the game: Eurasian, Siberian, jackal, Canadian, Polar, Ethiopian, and Tasmanian wolf. Dog breeds: dingo, hyena. And exclusive costumes: shaman, king, forest ninja, druid, wizard, knight and bard. Skins can be changed for all pack members.

- RESIDENTS OF THE FOREST. There are animals walking around the island looking for food, some of them fighting robots. If you help the residents of the forest, they will help you. For example, if you bring a desirable type of food to a resident, it will join the pack. Types of animals: hare, capercaillie (bird), wolverine, fox, lynx, boar, deer, bear. Each companion will give your pack a special bonus.

- SCROLLS OF SPELLS. There are scrolls of spells scattered throughout the forest. These can be wings of light, giving you great running speed, or fireballs, which will revolve around the character hitting many robots at once. There is also ice shield, healing, and powerful lightning. The more scrolls with a particular spell you pick up, the stronger it will be.

- ROBOTS AND BATTLE. Robots are constantly evolving, getting stronger, and changing their appearance. They patrol the forest in squads. The game features stun and critical hit mechanics. And if you go around the enemy from the back, you will inflict a stealthy strike with increased damage.

- TALENTS. Each time you gain a level, you will be able to choose one talent from two. Examples of talents: increased health or damage, ability to jump out of water, mini stun when struck by lightning, super jump when there is a capercaillie in the flock, and so on. In total, there are about 50 talents in the game.

- EXPLORATION. The action of the game takes place on a huge island which is located in the middle of a lake. There are cliffs, caves, wastelands, swamps, streams, and rivers to swim in! There are various valuables hidden throughout the forest: scrolls, coins, treasure chests, gold keys, and piles to dig up.

- QUESTS. The game features quests and plenty of achievements.

Enjoy the game. Sincerely, Avelog.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian
